mapper.select: SELECT quiz_id, title, description, created_at FROM quizzes
SELECT sw.word_id, sw.word, sw.description FROM quiz_questions qq JOIN sign_words sw ON qq.word_id = sw.word_id WHERE qq.quiz_id = #{quizId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO quiz_results (user_id, quiz_id, score, total) VALUES (#{userId}, #{quizId}, #{score}, #{total}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE score = #{score}, total = #{total}
